tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Naruto Uzumaki is a ninja from the Hidden Leaf Village known for his never-give-up attitude and strong determination.

He was once an outcast because he carried the powerful Nine-Tailed Fox inside him.

Despite his lonely childhood, Naruto dreams of becoming the Hokage to earn everyone’s respect.

Through hard work and perseverance, he becomes one of the strongest shinobi in history.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content:
• Shadow Clone Jutsu
  • Rasengan
  • Rasenshuriken
  • Sage Mode
  • Kurama Chakra Mode
  • Six Paths Sage Mode
  • Massive Chakra Reserves
  • Enhanced Healing Ability
  • Superhuman Speed & Reflexes
  • Advanced Taijutsu
  • Wind Release Chakra
  • Truth-Seeking Orbs
  • Chakra Arms
  • Tailed Beast Bomb
  • Sensory Abilities

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Favorite food is ramen
  • Host of the Nine-Tailed Fox (Kurama)
  • Became the 7th Hokage
  • Was once the weakest student in the academy
  • Never gives up on his friends

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Sasuke Uchiha is a powerful ninja from the Uchiha clan known for his intelligence and calm personality.

He was driven by revenge after witnessing the destruction of his clan by his brother Itachi.

Sasuke seeks power at any cost to achieve his goals and surpass his limits.

Over time, he evolves from a revenge-driven individual into a protector of the ninja world.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content:
• Sharingan
  • Rinnegan
  • Chidori
  • Amaterasu
  • Susanoo
  • Fire Style Jutsu
  • Lightning Release
  • Genjutsu Mastery
  • High Speed Combat
  • Swordsmanship
  • Space-Time Ninjutsu
  • Chidori Variants
  • Advanced Tactical Intelligence
  • Curse Mark Power
  • Perfect Susanoo

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Last surviving member of the Uchiha clan
  • Younger brother of Itachi Uchiha
  • Trained under Orochimaru
  • Rival and best friend of Naruto
  • Married Sakura and has a daughter Sarada

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Sakura Haruno is a skilled medical ninja and one of Naruto's closest teammates.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: She has incredible chakra control and powerful super strength.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Sakura becomes one of the strongest medical ninjas in the series.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Kakashi Hatake is the teacher of Team 7 and one of the most skilled ninjas in the Hidden Leaf Village.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Kakashi uses Sharingan, lightning blade techniques and strategic combat skills.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Kakashi later becomes the Sixth Hokage.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Itachi Uchiha is one of the most powerful and mysterious characters in Naruto.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: He possesses Mangekyo Sharingan and powerful genjutsu techniques.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Itachi sacrificed everything to protect his village and his younger brother Sasuke.
